overall.description: A cinematic gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a flying vehicle departing from a skyscraper rooftop, navigating through a dense neon-lit cyberpunk city at dusk, and landing on another high-rise building. The footage features ray-traced lighting and holographic advertisements on futuristic skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise rooftop departure point overlooking mountain range

events.description: flying vehicle lifts off from rooftop and begins forward acceleration
flying from open edge into dense urban canyon between skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: piloting a flying vehicle away from a skyscraper rooftop into the city, ascending slightly

notable_agents.action: distant flying vehicle moving parallel in the distance

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with illuminated 'Fuyutsuki' signage on the facade
distant mountain silhouette against the dusk sky
tall lattice tower with antennas on the horizon
another aerodyne vehicle flying in the distance

segments.scene_description: The sequence begins on a high-rise rooftop at dusk, with the Fuyutsuki building prominent on the right and mountains visible in the distance. The flying vehicle lifts off and accelerates forward, leaving the building edge and entering the dense urban airspace of the cyberpunk city.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense cyberpunk downtown with holographic advertisements

events.description: vehicle banks left to navigate between closely packed skyscrapers
sharp right turn around a corner building to align with new street canyon

agents.ego_description: maneuvering the flying vehicle through narrow gaps between towering skyscrapers covered in neon ads and holograms

entered.detail: building with large illuminated 'SOFTSYS' signage on the facade
distinctive red and white striped tower with glowing neon rings
elevated highway or monorail structure with blue lighting underneath
large purple and blue holographic advertisements floating between buildings

segments.scene_description: Flying through the dense urban canyon, the vehicle navigates between glass skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements. The SOFTSYS building appears on the right while an elevated transit line with blue lights passes below. The environment is dominated by neon lighting and towering structures blocking most of the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: vista del rey rooftop landing pad

events.description: vehicle slows down and begins descent toward rooftop landing pad
flying vehicle touches down on the rooftop landing pad

agents.ego_description: slowing the flying vehicle and carefully descending to land on a designated rooftop landing pad

entered.detail: large industrial-style building with flat rooftop and landing infrastructure
circular helipad with markings on the building rooftop
large HVAC units and ventilation structures on the rooftop

segments.scene_description: Approaching the destination in the Vista del Rey district, the vehicle slows and descends toward a rooftop landing pad. The surrounding buildings give way to the target structure with its industrial rooftop equipment. The vehicle carefully touches down on the marked landing pad, completing the flight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial journey that begins on a quiet skyscraper rooftop and plunges into the neon-drenched density of a futuristic urban canyon before settling on a distant landing pad. It begins with the vehicle lifting off from a high-rise at dusk, accelerating away from the Fuyutsuki building toward a horizon of distant mountains. As the vehicle enters the city's core, the open sky is replaced by towering glass skyscrapers and holographic advertisements, gliding past the SOFTSYS building while an elevated transit line glows blue below. The scene then shifts as the vehicle approaches the Vista del Rey district, slowing its pace and descending through the industrial architecture of the target high-rise. Finally, the camera follows the vehicle as it carefully touches down on a marked rooftop landing pad, completing the transition from the open heights to a precise urban destination.
